description: No contract criterion targets the 'structural_integrity' dimension. Phase 3 adversary review evaluates code organization, abstraction quality, and dead-code paths. The contract has no pass threshold for: (a) computeVisible being the single source of truth for visibleNoteIds (behavioral-spec.md §2 invariant: 'identical logic used in all four cases'), (b) absence of duplicated tag-filter / search-filter logic between feedReducer and computeVisible, (c) FilterApplied/FilterCleared / SearchInputChanged absence in the wired union (PROP-FILTER-021 partial), (d) helper extraction such as searchSortOf cited in 2c gate evidence. Without criteria, the adversary will be forced to invent thresholds.
